message: @trust_boundary(source_param='data') names a parameter of 'foo' but the function body never reads it; the decorator is structurally inert.
suggestion: @trust_boundary(source_param=...) names a parameter the function body never reads. The decorator is structurally inert — its suppression scope would cover nothing. Either drop the decorator, change source_param to the parameter the function actually treats as external data, or extend the function body to read from the declared boundary.
